name: Slow Cooked Pepper Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut beef into 3-inch by 1-inch strips.
2. Brown the beef in oil in a skillet.
3. Transfer to a slow cooker.
4. Combine the next seven ingredients; pour over beef.
5. Cover and cook on low for 5-6 hours or until meat is tender.
6. Add tomatoes and green peppers.
7. Cook on low for 1 hour longer.
8. Mix cold water and cornstarch to make a paste.
9. Stir into the liquid in the slow cooker and cook on high until thickened.
10. Serve over noodles or rice.
